# ManagedMediaListCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get a list of the managed books on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ManagedMediaListCommand
```

## Objects

- **ManagedMediaListCommand.Command**: The command to get a list of the managed books on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **ManagedMediaListResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get a list of the managed books on a device.
